CREATOR’S NOTE

—I’m getting so lazy with bio so bare with me. I don’t think I’ll ever be creative with my bio—

ALSOO, the way the story is written is to fit how he talks so if I use some terms that Americans normally don’t use that’s because of that!

—As you can tell I love sukuna so I made sure to write his episode downnnn-

This is a series! It’s called Brother Friends! It’s basically about your brother Noel friends who you simply can’t have because he forbade them to ever date you.

But it consists of Sukuna, Suguru, Satoru and Choso. But… there’s one character that can be added! Let’s hope my account can get more views and followers!

Just know all my pictures are from Pinterest!

Majority of the times I don’t know the creator to credit for! But sometimes it on the picture!

So follow and like and I love the comments you all leave!!
